public.title: CoinVault public collection shell
public.description: The public gallery foundation is ready for future collection browsing. This screen is intentionally a placeholder.

admin.title: CoinVault admin shell
admin.description: The private collection management foundation is ready for future authentication and item workflows.

health.title: Foundation health
health.description: Review the local web, backend, database, authentication, and storage foundations.

auth.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
auth.sessionLimitMessage: You have reached the maximum of 3 concurrent sessions. Revoke a session to continue, or wait for one to expire.
auth.sessionExpiryHint: The oldest session will expire automatically, allowing you to login without revoking.
auth.cannotUnlinkLastProvider: Cannot unlink your last authentication method
auth.emailExistsConflict: This email is already registered with a password. Please log in and link your Google account from settings.
auth.oauthUnauthorized: OAuth authorization failed. Please try again.
auth.invalidAuthCode: Invalid authorization code. Please try logging in again.
auth.oauthGenericError: An error occurred during OAuth login. Please try again.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.linkedAccountsDescription: Connect multiple authentication methods to your account for more flexibility.
settings.confirmUnlink: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account?
settings.lastProviderError: Cannot unlink the last authentication provider. Add another provider first.
settings.lastProviderWarning: You must have at least one authentication method linked to your account.

roles.forbiddenMessage: You do not have the required permissions to access this page. Please contact an administrator if you believe this is an error.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage your active login sessions across different devices and browsers.
sessions.sessionTimeout: Sessions expire after 7 days of inactivity
sessions.cannotRevokeCurrent: You cannot revoke your current session
sessions.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this session? The device will be logged out immediately.
sessions.revokeError: Failed to revoke session. Please try again.

categoryManagement.depthLimit: حد العمق: محاولة إنشاء فئة أعمق من 3 مستويات يجب أن يتم رفضها
categoryManagement.cycleDetection: اكتشاف الدورات: محاولة تعيين أصل الفئة إلى أحد أحفادها يجب أن تُمنع

itemManagement.prefixGeneration: إنشاء البادئة: يجب توليد بادئة العنصر تلقائياً بناءً على مسار الفئة
itemManagement.visibilityMasking: إخفاء الرؤية: لا يجب إرجاع العناصر المخفيّة في واجهات API العامة
